# PDFtoPortfolio

> Turn your PDF resume into a beautiful, shareable professional profile website in seconds.

## What is PDFtoPortfolio?

PDFtoPortfolio is a free tool that converts PDF resumes into hosted professional profile pages. Users upload their CV/resume PDF and the app automatically parses it and creates a public profile page accessible at a custom URL.

## Features

- Upload any PDF resume and get a hosted profile page instantly
- Multiple professional themes (Modern Creative, Classic Minimalist, Monochrome Professional)
- Editable profile: update work experience, education, skills, summary, and contact info
- Custom URL (e.g., yourname-abc12)
- Profile view tracking

## How it works

1. Upload your PDF resume on the homepage
2. Create an account (email/password or Google sign-in)
3. Your profile is automatically generated and published
4. Share your profile URL with employers, on LinkedIn, etc.

## Public profile pages

Each user's profile is accessible at: https://your-domain.com/{slug}

Profile pages include:
- Full name, contact info, location
- Professional summary
- Work experience history
- Education background
- Skills list

## Technology

Built with Next.js, Firebase, and TypeScript.
